Robert Marchi (415-464-8888) of Bradley, Curley, Barrabee & Kowalski, P.C. for Defendant/Moving party.
Shelley Kramer for A1 Protective Services.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

DISCUSSED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant'S Motion To Compel The Mental Examination Of Plaintiff: The motion is unopposed and will be granted. Defendant shall submit a proposed order in Word format to jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
